policy.storage: app-owned models/<model-id>/ after explicit user action

notes: Starter candidate for Android on-device experiments.
The upstream model page lists Qwen3-0.6B as 0.6B parameters with 32K context.
MobileCode must use a converted and checksummed mobile artifact before enabling direct install.
Research candidate for verifiable reasoning and contest-style coding.
Upstream model card lists 3B parameters and BF16 safetensors.
Upstream usage notes do not recommend tool-calling or autonomous coding-agent tasks.
Needs quantization, mobile runtime selection, checksum, memory proof, and latency evidence before direct install.
